title: E-Commerce Mobile App
summary: Cross-platform shopping app with real-time inventory and payments.
description: We built a full-featured e-commerce mobile application for iOS and Android using a modern cross-platform stack. The app includes real-time inventory sync, secure payment integration, and a smooth native experience.
imageAlt: E-Commerce app on phone and tablet

title: Healthcare Analytics Dashboard
summary: Real-time dashboards for hospital operations and patient metrics.
description: A secure, HIPAA-aware web dashboard for healthcare providers. Features real-time analytics, role-based access, and export to PDF/Excel.

title: Fintech Banking API
summary: Scalable API and admin panel for a digital banking product.
description: Backend API and admin panel for a digital banking startup. Includes account management, transactions, KYC flows, and partner integrations.

title: Travel Booking Platform
summary: Multi-vendor travel booking with search, filters, and payments.
description: A full-stack travel booking platform with flight, hotel, and activity search. Integrates with multiple providers and supports multi-currency.

title: Fitness & Wellness App
summary: Native iOS and Android app for workouts and progress tracking.
description: Native mobile apps for fitness tracking, workout plans, and progress analytics. Includes wearables sync and social features.
